title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at WOW Skin Science Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at WOW Skin Science Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
WOW Skin Science Ventures Solutions invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Madurai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About WOW Skin Science Ventures Solutions:
WOW Skin Science Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with WOW Skin Science Ventures Solutions!
